person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
*Robert de Clayton & Jane Farrington had 7 children: 4 sons & 3 daughters*
Robert de Clayton, 3-16-1470

1493 - Heir of brother William de Clayton
The estate went to Robert de Clayton, third son of Thomas (who was disinherited). 

Robert de Clayton married Jane Farrington, by whom he had 7 children:
four sons: 
Thomas born in 1498; John born in 1499; Edward born in 1505; and Richard born in 1506, 
and three daughters. 

He died in 1510 and was buried at Leyland and was succeeded by his eldest son Thomas Clayton.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight於1470年3月16日出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Thomas III de Clayton31歲，母親Jane Clifton26歲。他於大約1495年與Lady Jane Farrington在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1510年在英國藍卡爾利藍德享年41歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾利藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight于1470年3月16日出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Thomas III de Clayton31岁，母亲Jane Clifton26岁。他于大约1495年与Lady Jane Farrington在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1510年在英国藍卡爾利藍德享年41岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight was born on 16 March 1470, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas III de Clayton, was 31 and his mother, Jane Clifton, was 26. He married Lady Jane Farrington about 1495, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1510, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight est né le 16 mars 1470, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas III de Clayton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Clifton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Farrington environ 1495, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1510, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight am 16. März 1470 in Clayton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas III de Clayton 31 und seine Mutter Jane Clifton 26. Er hat um 1495 in Yorkshire, England Lady Jane Farrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1510 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Leyland, Lancashire, England und wurde in Leyland, Lancashire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Jane Farrington circa 1495, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ko.Shotesham St Mary, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 쇼츠함 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight(이)가 1470년 3월 16일 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas III de Clayton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Clifton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 영국 요르크실르에서 Lady Jane Farrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.Shotesham St Mary, Norfolk, England: шотешам ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Clayton, Knight родился 16 марта 1470 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas III de Clayton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Clifton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Farrington около 1495 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1510 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия.
